message:
fix: thread-isolate tests that fail under parallel interference

Tests using asupersync runtime TLS (ASUPERSYNC_HANDLE) fail when 25K+
tests run in parallel because block_on() installs handles into TLS that
get stomped by concurrent tests on the same thread. Fix by spawning
dedicated threads via run_async_test_isolated so each test gets pristine
TLS state.

Changes:
- runtime_compat: add run_async_test_isolated, wrap cx_cancellation test
- snapshot_engine: add run_async_test_isolated, wrap mid-flight cancel test
- mux_client: add run_async_test_isolated helper (for subscription tests)
- runtime: increase setup sleep margins for heavy-load resilience

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
